title: Session Type State Spaces Form Lattices — companion artifact
description: Code-and-data companion to the ICE 2026 paper "Session Type State Spaces Form Lattices" (published separately at ICE 2026 / EPTCS). Contains the Lean 4 mechanisation of the Reticulate Theorem (zero sorry, no coinduction), the Python reticulate lattice checker, and the 86 §2.1-conformant protocol benchmarks. Scoped to the paper's headline result; the paper PDF is not included here.
notes: Self-contained artifact. Link the paper's EPTCS DOI as "isSupplementTo" on the Zenodo record after publication. The paper's auxiliary mechanised results (duality, width-subtyping embedding, realisable fragment, divergent-recursion counterexample) and the Java BICA Reborn checker are distributed separately; this record ships the import closure of the headline theorem reticulate_lattice.
